sentences.translation: Majka je skuhala grašak s uljem i bijelim lukom.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cooked peas with oil and garlic.

sentences.translation: Miris je bio ukusan i ispunio je kuhinju.
sentences.translationEn: The smell was appetizing and filled the kitchen.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الْأَبُ مُتْعَبًا مِنَ الْعَمَلِ وَشَمَّ الرَّائِحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Otac je došao umoran s posla i nanjušio miris.
sentences.translationEn: The father came tired from work and smelled the aroma.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: يَا سَلَامَ هَذِهِ رَائِحَةُ الطَّعَامِ الْمَنْزِلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Bravo, ovo je miris domaće hrane.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Wonderful, this is the smell of home cooking.
